name: Web Search
description: Searches the web via Bing, Brave Search, or DuckDuckGo and can visit/extract text from a URL.

tools.name: web.search
tools.description: Search the web for up-to-date information. Returns a numbered list of results with titles, snippets, and URLs.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"query":{"type":"string","description":"The search query"},"max_results":{"type":"integer","description":"Number of results to return (1–10, default 5)","minimum":1,"maximum":10}},"required":["query"]}

tools.name: web.visit
tools.description: Fetch a URL and extract the readable text content. Useful for reading articles, documentation, or search result pages.
tools.argumentsSchemaJson: {"type":"object","properties":{"url":{"type":"string","description":"The https URL to visit"},"max_chars":{"type":"integer","description":"Maximum characters to return (default 4000)"}},"required":["url"]}
